step_rationale: Cardiomyocyte apoptosis regulator; miR-133a target reflecting myocardial injury response.
mechanism: BCL2L1 (Bcl-xL) is an anti-apoptotic gene whose downregulation via miR-133a promotes cardiomyocyte apoptosis in ischemic injury.

references.title: Abnormal expression of miR‑133a in patients with acute myocardial infarction following radical surgery for gastric cancer and the underlying mechanism.
